project.name: Residential House — Reference Build
project.description: End-to-end reference project: one detached house delivered from CAD/BIM to a costed Bill of Quantities. Revit, IFC and DWG models were converted with the DDC pipeline; element groups are linked to BOQ positions priced with real CWICR cost items and their material/labour/equipment resource breakdowns.
